payload.author: claude
payload.body: Suite shipped + locally validated (subagent built it; orchestrator re-verified every fixture from cold caches after the agent was stopped mid-report: 4/4 remediation fixtures fail with exactly their target rule, all references green, setup fixture correct both sides, runner/scorer compile). THE RUN ITSELF remains owner-gated per this ticket: commands + cost ballpark in eval/agent-workflow/README.md (~$1-2.50 per model both arms). Running it also closes the eval debt recorded on RT-68/72/73/74. Commit d278534.
